testcase.name: shouldInsertAndFindById
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: shouldUpdateProfile
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-17T11:02:05.448+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.insert : ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO users ( phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar, bio, zg_id, gender, birthday, school, tags_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? ) 2026-06-17T11:02:05.452+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.insert : ==> Parameters: 13500135000(String), null, null, 原始昵称(String), null, 原始简介(String), null, male(String), 2000-01-01(LocalDate), 原始学校(String), null, 2026-06-17 11:02:05.4483087(Timestamp), 2026-06-17 11:02:05.4483087(Timestamp) 2026-06-17T11:02:05.453+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.insert : <== Updates: 1 2026-06-17T11:02:05.487+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.u.mapper.UserMapper.updateProfile : ==> Preparing: UPDATE users SET nickname = ?, bio = ?, gender = ?, birthday = ?, school = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ? 2026-06-17T11:02:05.495+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.u.mapper.UserMapper.updateProfile : ==> Parameters: 新昵称(String), 新简介(String), male(String), 2000-01-01(LocalDate), 新学校(String), 3(Long) 2026-06-17T11:02:05.495+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.u.mapper.UserMapper.updateProfile : <== Updates: 1 2026-06-17T11:02:05.495+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.findById : ==> Preparing: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ? 2026-06-17T11:02:05.498+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.findById : ==> Parameters: 3(Long) 2026-06-17T11:02:05.498+08:00 DEBUG 49076 --- [ main] c.c.z.user.mapper.UserMapper.findById : <== Total: 1
